name: cc-plugin-codex
description: Expose Claude Code (`claude -p`) as a set of delegated skills inside Codex CLI — plan, implement, execute, review, rescue, and setup.
author: KoalaFacts

interface.shortDescription: Delegate planning, implementation, review, and rescue to Claude Code from inside Codex.
defaultPrompts: ask claude to plan: add a --no-cache flag
ask claude to review my current diff
ask claude to rescue this task — you're stuck, hand it over
